name: Phase 1B, Randomized, Double-Blinded, Dose Escalation, Single-Center, Repeat Dose Safety and Pharmacodynamics Study of the Oral NLRP3 Inhibitor Dapansutrile in Subjects With NYHA II-III Systolic Heart Failure
summary: A small randomized dose-escalation trial testing oral NLRP3 inhibition with dapansutrile in stable systolic heart failure.
